title: Historical Post-069 Branch Decision And Disjoint-Scope Planning Verdict

It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

objective: Choose the truthful post-069 branch and close a planning-only verdict on whether current Phase 5 evidence contains true disjoint multi-worker-safe source/test slices, without executing source edits, opening simultaneous multi-worker execution, opening a second mutation worker, approving migration, or mutating host/runtime/package surfaces.
active_role: Olares Disjoint Scope Planning Verdict Operator
dependency_note: Packet 069 restored publication hygiene for Packet 067 and Packet 068 authority at commit `a92e3fc40d2928edc2d4231b6feb6c5633c12cb6`; Packet 068 records one full one-mutation-worker pilot cycle complete but does not open simultaneous multi-worker execution.
verdict_summary: The current operations-web candidate surfaces do not support simultaneous multi-worker source/test mutation. The apparatus and relay application files are separate, but the available browser validation surface is still the single `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`, and Packet 059 already identified that shared file as the blocking overlap. The current tests directory contains only `browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`, so no separate tracked browser-smoke file currently exists to isolate relay and apparatus worker ownership.
evidence_floor: Packet 059 defined the safe pilot shape as one coordinator-owned governance/publication lane plus at most one mutation worker at a time.
Packet 059 identified the relay and apparatus source/test candidates as overlapping on `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
Packet 068 records one complete one-mutation-worker cycle, not simultaneous-worker approval.
Packet 069 published authority and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` clean parity at `a92e3fc40d2928edc2d4231b6feb6c5633c12cb6`.
Current app explorer files are separate: `apps/operations-web/app/apparatus-resource-explorer.tsx` and `apps/operations-web/app/relay-resource-explorer.tsx`.
Current operations-web tests directory contains only `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
`apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` currently contains apparatus and relay coverage, including the Packet 063 relay blank-input guard assertions.
decision_effect: Branch B is selected and closed as planning-only.
No simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution opens.
A later packet may plan test-surface decomposition or another separate one-worker pilot, but neither opens by implication.
The current tranche stops at this planning verdict per terminal milestone 2.
